case.title: SALT RIVER PROJECT AGRI. IMPROV. & POWER DIST. v. MESA

opinion.h4: SALT RIVER PROJECT AGRI. IMPROV. & POWER DIST. v. MESA, (1963)
SALT RIVER PROJECT AGRICULTURAL IMPROVEMENT & POWER DIST. v. CITY OF MESA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ARIZONA. No. 803. Decided April 15, 1963.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
J. La Mar Shelley, Charles S. Rhyne, Brice W. Rhyne and Alfred J. Tighe, Jr. for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
DANIELS v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF MONTANA. No. 814. Decided April 15, 1963.

Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Loevinger, Robert B. Hummel, Robert W. Ginnane and Arthur J. Cerra for the United States and the Interstate Commerce Commission; Newell Gough, Jr. and Edwin S. Booth for Great Northern Railway Co., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
